Printing Whistles with Rainbow Bloc

Thank you for joining the fight against ICE! We host public weekly events where we build whistle kits, fold zines, and discuss best practices on individual and community safety.

Download Whistle Codes Zine (PDF)

Which whistle file should I print?

We suggest printing one of the files below, as they have the best combination of speed, filament usage, and loudness.

  • MW Mini (3g)
  • MW Mini with PIRC # (3g)
  • MW Mini with PIRC # — Embossed (3g)
  • Tag (3.5g)
  • Tag with PIRC # (3.5g)

All types of whistles are accepted, though.

Do I need to print the PIRC Hotline # on the whistles?

Nope!

The hotline is on every flyer that comes with a whistle, and overwhelming feedback is that folks save the hotline # to their phones, rather than reading it off the whistle in the moment.

We included the whistles that have the PIRC # printed directly on them, as that is a common question, but you do NOT need to print the #. If the STL without the # prints faster or with less filament, please use that one.

What color should I use?

Any color or combination of colors!

What filament should I use?

Any filament! The files have been tested with many brands.

How many whistles should I print?

As many as you reasonably can!

The weekly builds are large, and we estimate building 5–8k kits each week, depending on whistles supplied.

How can I get the whistles to you?
  • Dropoff at one of our events: 6–8pm at Lucky Lab on Hawthorne, every Wednesday in February
  • Dropoff at a location in inner SE: 24/7, address shared in Signal only
  • Pickup is available depending on neighborhood — please message in Signal or email rainbowbloc@proton.me
Can I be reimbursed for the cost of filament?

Yes!

We appreciate if you are able to donate the cost of filament, but we're happy to reimburse if that isn't possible. For new printers, the reimbursement cap is $20/week. That cap can increase if you regularly supply large batches.

To be reimbursed, message one of the admins in the 3D printing Signal chat, or email rainbowbloc@proton.me.

Please include:

  • A receipt
  • A picture of the whistles
  • A rough count of whistles
  • Your Venmo (if you do not have Venmo, message us and we can work out another option)
How can I join the Signal chat for 3D printers?

DM @rainbowbloc on IG or email rainbowbloc@proton.me.
